name: The Fractured Ward
description: A sealed runic gateway blocks the data-stream. The localized axiomatic logic is fraying. Exploit the physical damage to bypass the magical constraints.

flaws.name: Cracked Binding Rune
flaws.flavor_text: The structural integrity of the rune is compromised. Activating it forcefully bypasses the gateway's safety interlock.

flaws.name: Leaking Mana Conduit
flaws.flavor_text: Unregulated ether bleeds from the pipe. If the safety interlock (binding) is active, the feedback loop will cause critical pressure.

flaws.name: Fractured Release Sigil
flaws.flavor_text: The release mechanism is jammed and ignoring standard inputs. It requires a critical mana spike to physically shatter the seal.
